chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No.D-1293 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 07-11-2024 Mr. Irfan Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Parkash Kumar, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh. Brig. (Retired) Falak Naz, Legal Advisor, Ministry of Defence. DSP Shahnawaz Jokhio, SDPO Kotri. Inspector Nisar Hussain Shah SHO PS Jamshoro. Syed Aamir on behalf of SSP Jamshoro. ----- Brig. (Retired) Falak Naz, Legal Advisor, Ministry of Defence, states that the Secretary of Defence has been occupied with foreign delegations for the past couple of weeks. If the Federal Secretary, Ministry of Defence, was genuinely engaged in official assignments, then at least the Additional Secretary Defence or Deputy Secretary, Ministry of Defence, should have appeared in the Court. This prima facie reflects a casual attitude towards the Cases of those persons whose families have sought their recovery and production with specific allegations against the Government functionaries and in particular Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs). Life and liberty of a citizen is of prime importance which should be safeguarded by the Government functionaries. On the next date, either the Secretary Ministry of Defence or the Additional Secretary/Deputy Secretary Defence shall be present along with para- wise comments regarding the merits of the case. To be listed on 27.11.2024 at 11:00 a.m. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
